hero.title: About CarbonTrack
hero.subtitle: We are a group of young people passionate about environmental protection and technology, teaming up to build a sustainable, low-carbon future.

team.title: Our Team
team.intro: Meet the dedicated members behind CarbonTrack who pour their creativity, technical expertise, and passion for environmental action into everything we do.

members.name: Yuanzheng (Jack) Yu
members.bio: Jack leads CarbonTrack, coordinating collaboration, defining the roadmap, and keeping our product experience polished. He believes the internet can connect more people with meaningful climate action.

members.name: Zining (Jeffery) Lyu
members.bio: Jeffery is our core technology partner and full-stack engineer. He is responsible for the architecture, development, and maintenance of the CarbonTrack web experience.

members.name: Minghan (Loren) Li
members.bio: Loren combines environmental science research with thoughtful design. He brings our mission to life through storytelling, photography, and a love for the outdoors.

members.name: Smiley Ni
members.bio: Smiley drives our creative direction, from campaign visuals to community storytelling. A passionate dancer and artist, she wants CarbonTrack to spread joy along with climate awareness.

members.name: Lan Liu
members.bio: Lan shapes our product operations and interface flows. She loves hiking, pottery, and bringing sustainable lifestyle ideas to the CarbonTrack community.

members.name: Jack Shi
members.bio: Jack focuses on user journeys and community experience. A lifelong ocean advocate, he volunteers with conservation groups and champions environmental literacy.

members.name: Tony Li
members.bio: Tony helps deliver new features, performance improvements, and smooth interactions that make CarbonTrack both powerful and approachable.

members.name: Eddie Peng
members.bio: Eddie crafts copy, educational resources, and onboarding content. He keeps our tone friendly and supportive for everyone exploring low-carbon living.

members.name: Michael Jiang
members.bio: Michael develops new user interface patterns and features. He cares deeply about accessible, joyful interaction design for climate products.

members.name: Peter Zhao
members.bio: Peter blends storytelling with visual design. He enjoys travel, sports, and video games, and hopes to inspire a broader environmental movement.

members.name: Kiana Jin
members.bio: Kiana leads marketing, events, and external partnerships. She brings diverse voices into our community and builds meaningful collaborations.

members.name: Kelly Du
members.bio: Kelly validates the scientific accuracy of our programs and writes accessible climate explainers. She leverages scuba diving experience and climate research to deepen public understanding.

members.name: Thomas Lu
members.bio: Thomas tests new features, finds edge cases, and helps us ship with confidence. He believes that "Attention is all you need" and champions thoughtful iteration.

members.name: Benson Zhou
members.bio: Benson co-created our early design language and now reviews user submissions, manages shared inboxes, and keeps community feedback flowing.

members.name: Arya Chen
members.bio: Arya contributes interface concepts and visual systems using tools like Photoshop and Audition. She is excited to deliver creative, user-friendly experiences.

members.name: Amily Gao
members.bio: Amily leads background research and carbon accounting. She ensures our content stays evidence-based and approachable for students.

members.name: Jerry Tang
members.bio: Jerry supports the carbon accounting model and conducts preliminary research that grounds our product decisions.

members.name: Yangyang Zhou
members.bio: Yangyang enjoys economics, mathematics, and basketball. He helped launch CarbonTrack and continues to advise on strategy.

members.name: Dora Xu
members.bio: Dora leads literature reviews and coordinates content production. She hopes to motivate more students to adopt low-carbon habits.

members.name: Hannah Zhang
members.bio: Hannah curates reading lists, produces media assets, and encourages small, everyday actions that add up to big impact.

members.name: Richard Hu
members.bio: Richard supports web development and cross-team collaboration. He wants to spread climate awareness and energy-saving tips widely.

members.name: Mandy Yu
members.bio: Mandy contributes illustrations and visual concepts. She hopes her art sparks curiosity and inspires greener lifestyles.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: CarbonTrack uses digital carbon accounts to make climate action personal, trackable, and rewarding.
items: Engage students and young people in conversations about climate change and carbon emissions.
Offer simple tools to log daily carbon footprints and celebrate low-carbon habits.
Raise awareness of the importance of energy conservation through storytelling and community challenges.
Support environmental and social initiatives that protect our shared planet.

achievements.title: Our Achievements
achievements.description: Together with the CarbonTrack community, we are turning carbon accounting into a shared, uplifting journey.

stats.label: Carbon Reduction
stats.description: CarbonTrack members regularly record low-carbon actions, turning everyday decisions into measurable climate impact.

stats.label: Community Growth
stats.description: Our low-carbon community grows through workshops, social media, and peer encouragement.

stats.label: Carbon Account Records
stats.description: Consistent habit tracking helps us validate our system and showcase the stability of our platform.

specialThanks.title: Special Thanks
specialThanks.subtitle: Celebrating the partners who lift our creativity.
specialThanks.description: We are grateful to "San Zuo Xue Shan" for providing design consultation and artwork that continue to inspire our visual identity.
